summary: The implementation covers most core requirements including Internet Identity authentication, role-based access, event management, team creation, registration, winner declaration, and the visual theme. However, several features are missing: schedule entries for events, notifications system, attendance tracking/check-in, bulk reminders, and export reports functionality appears incomplete. Some features like real-time statistics polling are approximated but not fully implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Organizers can add multiple schedule entries per event
missing_requirements.reason: The Event type in backend/main.mo does not include a schedules field. Events only have title, description, dateTime, and venue fields. No functionality exists for adding/managing multiple schedule entries.

missing_requirements.requirement: Statistics update in real-time as registrations occur
missing_requirements.reason: While the frontend uses polling (refetchInterval: 10000), this provides periodic updates every 10 seconds, not true real-time updates. The acceptance criteria specifies 'real-time' but the constraint acknowledges WebSocket is not supported. The implementation uses polling which approximates this but doesn't fully meet the 'real-time' criterion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement notification system for event updates and team invitations
missing_requirements.reason: No notification system is implemented. There are no notification records, no notification storage in the backend, no notification viewing interface for participants, and no functionality for organizers to send bulk reminders.

missing_requirements.requirement: Develop attendance tracking and check-in management system for organizers
missing_requirements.reason: While backend storage exists (checkedInParticipants map), there is no functionality to mark participants as checked-in. No mutation or backend function allows organizers to update attendance status. AttendeeListDialog only displays status but cannot modify it.

missing_requirements.requirement: Export includes participant names, teams, and registration status
missing_requirements.reason: The ExportReportButton component exports Principal IDs, team names, and check-in status, but does not include registration status (registered date/time or registration confirmation details) as specified in the acceptance criteria.
